Notice Of And Motion Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Courts Discovery Order
Off Calendar Nov-23-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS 640 OCTAVIA LLC, EDWARD KOUNTZE'S Motion For Reconsideration Of The Courts Discovery Order.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. On November 15, 2021, plaintiffs filed an amended notice of motion purporting to reset the motion for hearing in Dept. 302 on December 17, 2021. The Court notes, however, that the motion must be set for hearing in Dept. 301 before Judge Pro Tem Sigrid Arias, who issued the September 15, 2021 order as to which plaintiffs seek reconsideration. (Code Civ. Proc. sec. 1008(a) [application must be addressed to "the same judge or court that made the order"]; In re Marriage of Oliverez (2015) 238 Cal.App.4th 1242, 1247 ["A trial court's discretion to reconsider another judge's prior ruling is necessarily narrow and usually only appropriate when the prior judge is unavailable"].) The clerk of the court will be in contact with the parties to schedule a hearing on the motion before Judge Pro Tem Arias.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
